status: DEPLOYED — awaiting manual YouTube OAuth before first run
syntax_checks: All 11 Python files passed syntax check
cron_added_to: agentuser crontab (ytagent user creation requires sudo — not available in sandbox)

action_required.step_1: Run OAuth auth: python3 /opt/yt-agent/scripts/auth_setup.py — requires browser access to port 8080 (forward port or run locally with credentials)
action_required.step_2: Add YOUTUBE_API_KEY to /opt/yt-agent/.env from Google Cloud Console
action_required.step_3: Optionally add background.mp3 to /opt/yt-agent/assets/music/ for background music in videos
action_required.step_4: Install system packages with sudo: apt-get install -y ffmpeg imagemagick
action_required.do_not: Do NOT run orchestrator.py until auth_setup.py has been completed and token.json exists

notes: whisper (openai-whisper) install had metadata warnings — if subtitle generation fails, run: pip3 install git+https://github.com/openai/whisper.git
ytagent system user creation requires elevated sudo — currently runs under agentuser
Orchestrator will NOT run until next Sunday 2am unless triggered manually after OAuth is complete
